title: Human Consent Growth Agent — Inputs
description: Input data required to run the Human Consent Growth Agent for an organization.

industry.description: The industry or sector the organization operates in.

offer.description: A plain-language description of what is being offered.
examples: In-home care assessment and caregiver placement for seniors in Savannah, GA

market.description: Geographic or demographic market being targeted.

audience.description: Primary buyer persona for this growth effort.

situation.description: What is happening in their life right now that makes them a buyer?
examples: Parent recently fell. Managing care from 2 hours away. Exhausted and scared.

primary_desire.description: The single deepest desire driving their search.
examples: Permission to stop carrying this alone

primary_fear.description: The single greatest fear holding them back.
examples: Choosing the wrong agency and something going wrong — making it my fault

language.description: Words and phrases the audience uses to describe their situation.
examples: I need someone I can trust

desired_behavior.description: The specific action you want the audience to take voluntarily.

current_assets.description: Existing assets the organization has (website, reviews, credentials, content, partnerships).

competitors.description: Key competitors, their strengths, and where they are vulnerable.

channels.description: Distribution channels currently active or under consideration.

constraints.description: Known limitations on what can be claimed or deployed.

verified_claims_only.description: Claims that need verification before use — mark with [VERIFY].

budget_tier.description: Relative budget level to calibrate recommendations.
